# Bible Scholar Kids

> Bible Scholar Kids is an interactive Bible learning app for children ages 6-12. It features 163 illustrated episodes covering the full Bible narrative from Genesis to Revelation, 10,000+ quiz questions across 5 quiz types, a pet lamb companion called Shepherd, verse memorization tools, a prayer journal, and a parent dashboard. The app is COPPA compliant, ad-free, and has no social features or data collection.

## About

Bible Scholar Kids was born from a simple idea: every child deserves to know the Bible, and learning it should be an adventure, not a chore. The app makes Scripture accessible, engaging, and fun for children ages 6-12 through illustrated stories, interactive quizzes, and a companion who grows with them.

The content is non-denominational and focuses on teaching the biblical narrative faithfully. Bible Scholar Kids does not add to or take away from Scripture - it simply makes it accessible to young minds.

## Key Features

- 163 illustrated episodes across 21 seasons covering the full Bible (Genesis to Revelation)
- 5 quiz types: multiple choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank, verse ordering, image matching
- 10,000+ quiz questions
- Shepherd companion: a pet lamb that evolves through 5 stages with 27 customizable accessories
- 6 Bible translations: English (KJV), Spanish, French, Portuguese, Chinese, Arabic
- Verse memorization using spaced repetition
- Daily missions and streaks
- Prayer journal with 5 categories
- Parent dashboard with progress tracking, quiz review, and time limits (15/30/45/60 minutes)
- 50 levels and 23 achievement badges

## Safety and Privacy

- No advertisements ever
- No social features or stranger contact
- Parent-gated controls (math problem verification)
- COPPA compliant - no personal data collected from children
- All data stays on device
- Parental time limits

## Pricing

- Free: First 10 episodes, 5 hearts/day, basic daily verse, 1 quiz type - $0
- Monthly: All 163 episodes, unlimited hearts, all 5 quiz types, verse memorization - $4.99/month
- Yearly: Everything in Monthly plus Shepherd evolution, prayer journal, streaks - $49.99/year
- Family: Everything in Yearly plus up to 5 kid profiles, individual tracking - $79.99/year

## Use Cases

- Home Bible study for families
- Sunday School lesson reinforcement
- Children's ministry group activities
- Homeschool Bible curriculum supplement
- Verse memorization programs
- Weekly Bible challenges for church classes
